The '''''Wennis''''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and later [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Wennis'' was a trowel-shaped [[Starship/Legends|ship]] primarily referred to as a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]], but was also given the designations of "Imperial Cruiser" or [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battle cruiser]]. It was surface-coated "dead black," easily transported 24 [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and sported "continent-destroying [[hell projector]]s".<ref name="Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka" />

==History==
''Wennis'' was constructed approximately [[78 BBY]] and was decommissioned sometime after the foundation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Early in his reign, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] gave the ship as a gift to [[Rokur Gepta]], whom he had just installed as [[Scrivinir]] of the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]], which was little more than a puppet state of the Galactic Empire.<ref name="TDSSB">''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]''</ref>

Although the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the Centrality, its crew wore no military markings, in order to maintain "certain political fictions." This was because its crew was part [[Centran]], part Imperial.

The ''Wennis'' was destroyed with all crew during the [[Battle of ThonBoka]] by [[Klyn Shanga]] and his [[Renatasian]]s.<ref name="Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka" />
